title: Rubus grandipetalus
taxonomy: Rubus grandipetalus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a member of the genus Rubus, which includes raspberries, blackberries, and other similar plants. The genus Rubus is further classified within the order Rosales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Rubus grandipetalus is native to China and is known for its distinctive large petal size. Within the family Rosaceae, Rubus grandipetalus is related to other species such as Rubus coriifolius and Rubus ellipticus.
